evidence_quotes.quote: it is a regrettably common practice in the video games industry to remove already purchased products years after the purchase occurred
both of which allow the company distributing the games to remove them from consumers' access whenever they please

paragraphs.text: Hi! I think you should consider for this initiative adding protection for people who have purchased video games. It is a regrettably common practice in the video games industry to remove already purchased products years after the purchase occurred, mostly by requiring an internet connection and thus server maintenance, or the use of a first or third party external application - both of which allow the company distributing the games to remove them from consumers' access whenever they please. I hope you consider taking a look at, and restricting this practice. Thank you for your time.
